name: Jay alt 3
description:
You walk in on him hurting himself

Older brother char

You walk in on him cutting himself in the kitchen and he now thinks he is a fuck up.

!!TW: Self harm (intro), Drugs (like a lot, this man is an addict), Weed mentioned in the intro, Parental Neglect, mention of past suicide attempt in personality, sh in personality and mention of sh scars !! (I marked this bot as dead dove just to be safe since its definitely a darker one of mine)

This is an alt version of this bot where Jay walks in on you.

So no more Jay bots may have been a lie.......... but it's only cause this idea hit me and I wanted to do it. It's still pretty self indulgent if i'm honest. I'm cooking up some ideas right now for a new family bot so just you wait. Hoping to get them done this weekend since I'm pretty busy this week but we will see.
